title: Road to 7.0 Pickleball
subtitle: Master Compact Power, Core Mechanics, and the Habits of Elite Play
author: Quang Duong
description: The definitive guide to climbing the ratings ladder by mastering the habits elite players actually use — starting with compact power, core engagement, and the legendary one-inch-punch philosophy applied to the kitchen line.
bulletPoints: Learn the 'Bruce Lee's 1 inch punch' habit: minimal backswing + core-driven power
Cross-sport insights from tennis, table tennis, squash, and martial arts
Court-tested drills used by 5.0–6.0+ competitors and high-performance coaches
Clear progression maps from solid rec play toward elite doubles strategy
Written for ambitious players who want less fluff and more transferable mechanics
